IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (89413122.pdf)
SUMMARY: Personable project manager with over eight years of experience in managing large and complex projects, developing project initiatives, and achieving performance targets. Strong in process improvement, results-oriented, detail-oriented, and information technology.
SKILLS: Project Management, Information Design, Relationship Building, Information Technology, Procedure Development, Scheduling, Website Design, MS Office Suite, Training Development, Quality Processes, Event Planning, Work Breakdown Structures

JOB TITLE: Operations Research Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2010 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Managed program testing incoming radiation detection equipment into New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut. Developed processes, coordinated with NYPD, and managed testing team.

COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Managed data collection and test for a radiation detector prototype. Coordinated with NYPD, regional toll authorities, and National Laboratories.

DESCRIPTION: Designed data structures and developed systems for science-related database applications. Assisted the Protecting Human Subject Program Manager.
